name: as-usual
description: An agent harness that helps coding agents follow a team's usual workflow through topic-level questions, requirements, plans, and state.

interface.shortDescription: Follow the team's usual workflow through a core workflow plus topic-level questions, requirements, plans, and state.
interface.longDescription: AsUsual adds a session-start hook and workspace templates so requests detected as AsUsual work move through a topic-level question cycle, written requirements, implementation plan, and state record before execution.
defaultPrompt: Use AsUsual to clarify this request and write the requirements and plan.
